Wärtsilä Corporation - Manager's transaction: Holm, Roger Social share for Facebook Social share for Twitter/X Social share for LinkedIn Social share for Bluesky Share with Email English Published: 2026-07-01 17:05:00 CEST Wärtsilä - Managers' Transactions Wärtsilä Corporation - Manager's transaction: Holm, Roger Wärtsilä Corporation, Managers' transactions, 1 July 2026 at 18:05 EEST Wärtsilä Corporation - Managers' transaction: Holm, Roger According to the stock exchange release published on 26 June 2026, the Board of Directors of Wärtsilä Corporation has decided a directed share issue for the reward payments based on the Restricted Share Plan 2023–2025 in accordance with the terms and conditions of the plan. Pursuant to this decision, shares have been transferred as follows to member of the Board of Management Roger Holm: Wärtsilä Corporation - Managers' transactions - Holm ____________________________________________ Person subject to the notification requirement Name: Holm, Roger Position: Other senior manager Issuer: Wärtsilä Corporation LEI: 743700G7A9J1PHM3X223 Notification type: INITIAL NOTIFICATION Reference number: 743700G7A9J1PHM3X223_20260701151640_26 ____________________________________________ Transaction date: 2026-07-01 Venue not applicable Instrument type: SHARE ISIN: FI0009003727 Nature of the transaction: RECEIPT OF A SHARE-BASED INCENTIVE Transaction details (1): Volume: 6426 Unit price: 0.00 EUR Aggregated transactions (1): Volume: 6426 Volume weighted average price: 0.00 EUR More information: Hanna-Maria Heikkinen Vice President, Investor Relations Tel. +358 10 709 1461 hanna-maria.heikkinen@wartsila.com Wärtsilä in brief Wärtsilä is a global leader in innovative technologies and lifecycle solutions for the marine and energy markets. We emphasise innovation in sustainable technology and services to help our customers continuously improve environmental and economic performance. Our dedicated and passionate team of 17,900 professionals in 199 locations in 78 countries shape the decarbonisation transformation of our industries across the globe. In 2025, Wärtsilä’s net sales totalled EUR 6.9 billion. Wärtsilä is listed on Nasdaq Helsinki. www.wartsila.com Company News Subscribe European Market Activity Nasdaq Europe © 2026, Nasdaq, Inc. All Rights Reserved.
